note: Capstone of the research block (026-030). Same-run head-to-head: 009 baseline (plain binary, tile=1, C=1000) vs research-best (rotation x2 + tiling x16). Research adds +0.29pts recall AND +64% QPS (0.9931@516 -> 0.9960@845), or 0.9990@730. Research = RaBitQ/ITQ random rotation (free, popcount-speed). Summary of 026-030 below.

research_block.result: free recall: +2.4pts stage-1, 0.9943->0.9970 @ C=1000, zero QPS cost
best recall-per-bit: stage-1 0.606 vs 0.463, 5-10x smaller C; but 40x slower scan (needs fast SIMD kernel)
